Okay, so first, the issue of privacy: Social media platforms often collect vast amounts of personal data from children, which can be used for targeted advertising, behavioral tracking, and other purposes. Okay, so second, the issue of safety: Children are more vulnerable to online predators, cyberbullying, and other online dangers.
